name: inzozi-ecosystem-monorepo
description: Unified monorepo workspace for INZOZI Group ecosystem applications

scripts.dev:inzozi: concurrently "npm run dev -w inzozigroup/inzozi-backend" "npm run dev -w inzozigroup/inzozi-frontend"
scripts.dev:impressa: concurrently "npm run dev -w impressa/impressa-backend" "npm run dev -w impressa/impressa-frontend"
